Class DRDesignImage

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignHyperlinkComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignImage
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDesignComponent, DRIDesignHyperLinkComponent, DRIDesignImage, Serializable
